components.name: PolicySyncService {#policy-sync-service}
components.description: Periodically fetches policies from Git repository, validates them, and updates the database cache. Triggered by Git webhook or poll timer (60s fallback).

components.name: GitPolicySource {#git-policy-source}
components.description: Fetches policy YAML files from a Git repository.

components.name: PolicyEvaluator {#policy-evaluator}
components.description: Evaluates a BreakingChangeReport against active policies.

components.name: PolicyRepository {#policy-repository}
components.description: JPA repository for the policy cache.

components.name: Policy DSL Format {#policy-dsl}
components.description: Policies are defined in YAML files stored in the Git repository:
